projectSlug.description: Stable project identifier, for example shadow-clock-case.

inspiration.description: Raw premise, reference direction, or seed brief from the user.

mode.description: lean or full. lean keeps the foundation compact; full expands relationships and scene bible depth.

intake_brief.description: Director owns intake and defines the shared creative contract before specialist generation starts.

context_scan.prompt:
你是 Novel-Director-Curator。基于开书简报做项目上下文扫描和 llmwiki 使用计划，但不要写入任何外部系统。

上游简报：${intake_brief.output.handoff}

目标：识别本项目需要沉淀到知识库的对象类型、命名规范、目录结构、检索标签和后续同步策略；如本地没有已有 wiki 内容，就输出待创建计划；如果需要调用 llmwiki，也仅说明命令/对象设计，不实际执行。

输出必须只包含 JSON，字段：preview(string)、handoff(string)、data(object, 包含 namespace_plan/entity_types/file_or_page_plan/index_strategy)、open_questions(array)、risks(array)、wiki_refs(array)、change_declarations(array)。
context_scan.description: Director prepares continuity storage semantics without producing side effects.

creative_foundation.description: Creative Architect produces the first integrated story foundation from the approved role design.

continuity_review.description: Validator gates the foundation before the creative role consolidates it.

foundation_revision.description: Creative Architect owns the creative revision after validation, keeping the team minimal.

story_bible_package.description: Director performs the final editorial packaging after human approval of the foundation candidate.

wiki_sync_plan.description: Director turns the approved Story Bible draft into a safe llmwiki synchronization plan without side effects.
